events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need parse scenario. Task: identify component or condition shown, name visible defect cues. Setting heavy industrial I&C loop checks & wiring. Observed field condition: missing surge protection on field side. Work rough-complete. Condition categories may apply installed-defective. Need produce JSON with decision fail because non-compliant? Missing surge protection is a defect/non-compliance. Risk? Surge protection missing on field side can damage instruments, cause spurious signals, safety issues. In industrial process, maybe high risk due to lightning/transients causing failure. Could be medium/high. Since missing protection not immediately dangerous but critical for reliability. Let's assess. The required decision if dangerous or non-compliant must be fail. Non-compliant => fail. Risk high maybe. Component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 75. value irrelevant 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. findings: missing surge protection device at field instrument/signal line; no transient voltage suppression on field side per spec/drawings. actions: install specified surge protective device per loop drawing/spec; verify grounding; retest loop. rationale: surge protection required on field side to protect instruments and control system from transients; absence is a non-conforming installation and defect. references: loop drawings, ISA 5.1, maybe NEC/ISA? But only loop drawings and ISA 5.1 on hand. Could include IEC 61643? But instructions say apply reference material. Use loop drawings, ISA 5.1. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.
